info.name: Astronomy
info.description:
Collection containing all possible requests to a single GraphQL endpoint. Serves the following astronomical data:

- Near-Earth Objects (NEOs) - CRUD-functionality
    
- Orbits - Read-only
    
- Close Approaches - Read-only
    

Mutation requests for NEOs require a JWT token to be passed in the body. The token is obtained via login, which requires first registering an account.

item.name: Auth
Register
item.description: Folder containing registration requests, with different queries to test for both success and failure.

request.description: See Register - Success request.
